message:
fix: update ms tool icon, colors, and descriptions for consistency

- Change icon from "Layers" to "Sparkles" (match flywheel site)
- Change color from indigo-violet to teal-emerald (match flywheel site)
- Add MS to coreDescription text
- Remove MS from supportingDescription (now core tool)
- Update hero description from "13" to "14" interconnected tools

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
